## Verification

- [ ] `npm run type-check` passes
- [ ] `npm run lint` passes
- [ ] `npm run build` succeeds
- [ ] If UI: screenshot before/after attached
- [ ] If new check: methodology added to `docs/SCANNER-METHODOLOGY.md` + i18n strings + check-context

## Linked issue

<!-- e.g. Fixes #42 — leave blank for trivial typo fixes -->

## CLA

By submitting this PR you accept the [Contributor License Agreement](../CLA.md).
Add a `Signed-off-by` trailer to your commit:

```
git commit -s -m "your message"
```

This generates `Signed-off-by: Your Name <your.email@example.com>`, which we
treat as CLA acceptance per the Linux kernel convention.
